description: MCP server to introspect and cryptographically verify the Autonomous Republic as one sealed, Ed25519-signed object. Serves proofs (verify_republic), not just data.

tools.name: verify_republic
tools.description: Recompute corpus seal, verify all Ed25519 signatures, walk the census chain, check foreign keys. Returns proofs.

tools.name: get_constitution
tools.description: The Constitution's articles (one by id, or all).

tools.name: resolve_article
tools.description: An article plus the rails that invoke it.

tools.name: get_rails
tools.description: The rails: articles, normas, npm package, State endpoint shadowed.

tools.name: get_codex
tools.description: Pillars, laws, decrees, counts, seals, public keys.
